title: conyza canadensis var. glabrata
intro: Conyza canadensis var. glabrata, also known as Canadian fleabane or rough hawk's beard, is a variety of the annual herbaceous plant Conyza canadensis. It is a flowering plant native to North America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Conyza canadensis var. glabrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. Conyza canadensis var. glabrata can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties, or used in herbal remedies such as salves and infusions for topical application.
